code:
import io
import string

fn abs_val(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n < 0
    -n
  else
    n
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line_opt = io.read_line()
  let line = match line_opt
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)

  let first_str = match tokens.get(0)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no tokens")
  end

  let first_val = match string.parse_int(first_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("parse error")
  end

  mut min_val = first_val
  mut min_abs = abs_val(first_val)
  mut i = 1

  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end

    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    let a = abs_val(n)
    if a < min_abs
      min_val = n
      min_abs = a
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  print("min_abs=#{min_val}")
  Ok(())
end
